name: Agrivi Farm Management Software API
what_it_does: Agrivi farm management information system (FMIS) REST API for crop planning, farm operations tracking, and sustainable agriculture compliance for global commercial farming operations. Enables AI agents to manage farm field and production unit management for digital farm operations automation, handle crop season planning and task scheduling for farming workflow automation, access field activity recording and labor tracking for farm operations documentation, retrieve product (pesticide, fertilizer) application recording for regulatory compliance automation, manage harvest and yield recording for crop production tracking automation, handle farm inventory and stock management for farm input management automation, access farm financial tracking and cost per activity for farm profitability analysis, retrieve sustainability reporting and carbon footprint calculation for ESG farming compliance, manage weather monitoring and growing degree day calculation for agronomic decision automation, and integrate Agrivi with precision agriculture hardware, ERP systems, and sustainability reporting platforms for global farm management ecosystem.
use_cases: Planning crop seasons from farm operations agents
Recording field activities from compliance agents
Tracking yields from production analytics agents
Reporting sustainability from ESG farming agents
not_for: Equipment telemetry and machine guidance (use John Deere OC or Trimble Ag)
best_when: A commercial farm, fruit and vegetable operation, or agricultural enterprise (particularly in Europe, Middle East, or global markets) wanting AI agents to automate crop planning, field activity recording, chemical application compliance, yield tracking, and sustainability reporting within Agrivi.
avoid_when: EU PESTICIDE APPLICATION REGULATORY COMPLIANCE: Automated pesticide application recording in Agrivi for EU farms must apply EU Maximum Residue Limit (MRL) regulations and national authorization for each plant protection product; automated recording of unauthorized pesticide application creates food safety violation and export market rejection. ORGANIC CERTIFICATION AUDIT TRAIL: Automated farm management records in Agrivi for organic-certified farming must maintain complete audit trail of all inputs (allowed vs prohibited); automated organic activity recording without allowed-inputs validation creates organic certification compliance risk and certifier audit failure. WORKER SAFETY PRE-HARVEST INTERVAL (PHI): Automated harvest scheduling in Agrivi must verify pre-harvest interval for all pesticide applications; automated harvest before PHI expiry creates food safety residue violation and potential market withdrawal.

auth.notes: Agrivi uses API key and OAuth authentication. REST API with JSON. Zagreb, Croatia HQ. Founded 2013 by Matija Zulj. Private ($10M+ raised, European investors). Global farm management platform with European focus. Sustainability and compliance reporting differentiation. SaaS FMIS with mobile app. UN FAO collaboration. Global commercial farming customers in 150+ countries. Competes with Trimble Agriculture, Agworld, and FarmForce for FMIS.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Free plan for small farms; Pro and Enterprise annual subscriptions for larger operations
pricing.paid_tiers: Starter (free), Pro, and Enterprise annual subscriptions; per-hectare or per-user pricing for larger farms; agribusiness multi-farm pricing
pricing.notes: Zagreb Croatia. Private ($10M+). Founded 2013. Global 150+ countries. Sustainability and compliance focus. Freemium with Pro/Enterprise tiers.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API key; farm data and reporting queries throttled; no webhooks — polling required

known_agent_gotchas: NO WEBHOOKS — FARM ACTIVITY AND COMPLIANCE EVENTS REQUIRE POLLING: Agrivi does not support native webhooks; automated farm compliance reporting, yield tracking, and task completion detection require scheduled polling aligned with farming seasonal cadence and daily field activity cycles

EU MRL PESTICIDE DATABASE CURRENCY: Automated pesticide application recording in Agrivi for EU produce must use current EU MRL database (updated by EFSA); Agrivi product database may lag regulatory changes; automated application recording must validate against current EU regulation for each product and crop combination

ORGANIC FARM AUDIT TRAIL COMPLETENESS: Automated activity recording for organic-certified farms must capture all inputs with allowed/prohibited status per certification body (EU Organic Regulation, USDA NOP); automated recording without certification body-specific allowed inputs validation creates organic audit failure; implement certification body rule engine in automation layer

Multi-language and multi-country regulatory compliance — Agrivi operates in 150+ countries with different pesticide registration, MRL, and agronomic regulation; automated compliance recording must apply country-specific regulation, not generic global standard; EU regulation does not apply to non-EU farms and vice versa

Sustainability metric data quality for ESG reporting — Agrivi sustainability reporting (carbon footprint, water usage, biodiversity impact) depends on accurate and complete activity recording; automated ESG reporting from incomplete farm data creates sustainability metric inaccuracy in investor and supply chain ESG reporting

Offline mobile sync for field data capture — Agrivi mobile app supports offline field activity recording; automated data integration must handle offline sync conflicts when field workers reconnect; server-side conflict resolution strategy must be understood before relying on Agrivi data as system of record for compliance reporting
agent_readiness.security_notes: Farm management. SOC2, GDPR. API key/OAuth. EU/US. Farm boundary, crop, and pesticide application data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Farm management. SOC2, GDPR. API key/OAuth. EU/US. Farm data, crop planning, and application records.
